text:
or needed on fewer than 
7 days each week or less than 8 hours of each day for periods of 21 days or less (with 
extensions in exceptional circumstances when the need for additional care is finite and 
predictable). 

A patient must meet each of the criteria specified in this section. Patients who meet each 
of these criteria are eligible to have payment made on their behalf for services discussed 
in §§40 and 50. 

30.1 - Confined to the Home 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3117.1, HHA-204.1
